title: Package Archiver & Archive Management

classes.name: ArchiverInterface
methods: archive(string $sources, string $target, string $format, array $excludes = [], bool $ignoreFilters = false): string

classes.name: ArchiveManager
methods: archive(CompletePackageInterface $package, string $format, string $targetDir, ?string $fileName = null, bool $ignoreFilters = false): string

classes.name: PharArchiver
properties: protected static $formats: array<string,int> — zip=>Phar::ZIP, tar=>Phar::TAR, tar.gz=>Phar::TAR, tar.bz2=>Phar::TAR
methods: archive(string $sources, string $target, string $format, array $excludes = [], bool $ignoreFilters = false): string
classes.notes: Uses PharData internally; creates ArchivableFilesFinder + ArchivableFilesFilter; supports zip/tar/tar.gz/tar.bz2

classes.name: ZipArchiver
methods: archive(string $sources, string $target, string $format, array $excludes = [], bool $ignoreFilters = false): string
classes.notes: Uses PHP ZipArchive extension; only supports 'zip' format; preserves Unix file permissions via setExternalAttributesName

classes.name: ArchivableFilesFinder
classes.notes: Wraps Symfony Finder; applies GitExcludeFilter and ComposerExcludeFilter; ignoreVCS=true, ignoreDotFiles=false, sortByName; accepts only files and empty dirs

classes.name: ArchivableFilesFilter
classes.notes: Wraps ArchivableFilesFinder; filters out dirs (collects them), exposes only files; addEmptyDir() adds collected empty dirs to PharData

classes.name: BaseExcludeFilter
classes.notes: Converts gitignore-style glob rules to regex patterns; negated patterns (!) override previous filter decisions

classes.name: ComposerExcludeFilter
classes.notes: Loads exclude rules from composer.json archive.exclude array; calls generatePatterns() in constructor

classes.name: GitExcludeFilter
classes.notes: Parses .gitattributes for 'export-ignore' / '-export-ignore' rules; uses parseLines() + parseGitAttributesLine() callback

relationships: ArchiveManager depends_on DownloadManager (download + install package sources)
ArchiveManager depends_on CompletePackageInterface (getArchiveName, getDistReference, getSourceReference, getArchiveExcludes, setArchiveName, setArchiveExcludes)
ArchivableFilesFilter wraps ArchivableFilesFinder (constructor injection via parent FilterIterator)
key_call_chains: ArchiveManager::archive() → DownloadManager::download() + install() — fetch sources for non-root packages
ArchiveManager::archive() → usableArchiver.archive(sourcePath, tempTarget, format, excludes, ignoreFilters)
PharArchiver::archive() → new ArchivableFilesFinder() → [new GitExcludeFilter(), new ComposerExcludeFilter()]
ArchivableFilesFinder::__construct() — Finder.filter() callback calls filter.filter(relativePath, exclude) on each filter in order
BaseExcludeFilter::filter() — iterates excludePatterns, applies Preg::isMatch, respects negate flag
important_notes: ArchiveManager selects archiver via supports(format, sourceType); first match wins
getSupportedFormats() hard-codes ZipArchiver→[zip], PharArchiver→[zip,tar,tar.gz,tar.bz2] by class name
ArchiveManager writes to a temp file first, then renames to final target (atomic write)
buildExcludePatterns() auto-excludes any pre-existing archives matching the package name pattern
RootPackageInterface packages archive from realpath('.') — no download needed
PharArchiver handles empty archives (0 files) by writing minimal valid binary content
ZipArchiver preserves Unix permissions via ZipArchive::setExternalAttributesName (libzip 0.11.2+)
Filter pipeline in ArchivableFilesFinder: GitExcludeFilter → ComposerExcludeFilter; each can override prior decision
ArchivableFilesFilter accepts only files (not dirs); dirs collected for addEmptyDir() in Phar case only
